stemHtml: How is the Special Position Identification (SPI) pulse transmitted?

options.a: By the SSR interrogator if it is suspected that responses are received from aircraft that are located in the direction of the side lobes of the interrogator antenna.
options.b: By the SSR interrogator in order to request the identification of an aircraft.
options.c: By the transponder as a result of the pilot pushing the IDENT button.
options.d: Automatically when the transponder responds to a mode A interrogation.
